violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Repair damaged door to reach in cooler (Janette) in kitchen.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Ice machines have build up inside and need cleaning.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in cooler (Janette) and drawer cooler under grills have pooling water and need cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Cooking equipment, coolers, & freezers have build-up and need cleaning. Grease build up around fryers and grills needs cleaning.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Store boxes of single service items off floor in basement storage area. Invert or return items to boxes/bags in basement storage area.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle. Upper level rest room refuse can not provided with lid.

Reheating food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not reheated rapidly so all parts reached a temperature of 165F for 15 seconds within one hour. Products being re-heated in hold units. Ensure re-heated food items are cooked to proper temperatures within 1 hour.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Two door prep cooler has damaged door & gasket. Exposed foam insulation. Needs repair.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Exposed foam insulation at walk in freezer door threshold.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in kitchen, service alley and walk in freezer have an accumulation of food & debris. Need cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
